reasoning: Order #000000787 is marked Complete with the item invoiced and shipped (Qty shipped: 1). Total was fully paid and no refund has been issued. Since the customer claims non-receipt but the system indicates shipment completion, this requires a delivery investigation (carrier tracking / proof of delivery) before issuing any refund. Escalating to fulfillment/shipping team is appropriate rather than approving or denying immediately.
